response.justification: Bogdan has solid, broad software engineering fundamentals spanning 15+ years and demonstrated experience with high-throughput distributed systems, but the resume shows no meaningful alignment with the core competencies this role demands: experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, growth measurement, telemetry infrastructure, or statistical/experimental analysis. The position is specifically Principal/IC6 with deep domain expertise in growth and experimentation systems, and there is no evidence the candidate has worked in these specialized areas at any point in their career. General software craftsmanship and technical breadth do not substitute for the required experimentation domain depth.
strengths: 15+ years of diverse engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems, with languages matching the JD (JavaScript/TypeScript, C, C++, Java)
Demonstrated experience building high-throughput, low-latency microservices at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second, showing production systems-at-scale credibility
Active technical educator with workshops, conference talks, and open-source libraries, indicating mentorship and influence capabilities relevant to Principal-level expectations
concerns: Zero demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management — the primary technical mandate of this role
No evidence of telemetry infrastructure, metrics pipelines, growth funnels, or data-driven experimental analysis; the role requires high data aptitude as a core qualification

No evidence of Principal/IC6-scope impact: owning multi-workstream initiatives, driving cross-team technical strategy, or translating ambiguous business goals into measurable growth engineering outcomes

key_factors.factor: No experimentation or growth platform experience
No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background
